title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 486.1120 - Notary commission and registration required
text:
486.1120.  Notary commission and registration required. — 1.  Prior to performing remote online notarial acts, a person shall apply to be a commissioned notary for the state of Missouri.
  2.  A remote online notary shall register the capability to perform remote online notarial acts with the secretary before performing remote online notarial acts.
  3.  Upon recommissioning, a notary shall again register with the secretary before performing remote online notarizations.
  4.  A person may apply or reapply for a notary commission and register or reregister to perform remote online notarial acts at the same time.
(L. 2020 H.B. 1655)
